prompt: Hand-drawn coloured illustration — clean, elegant, editorial. Visible ink and pencil line work with soft hand-painted colour fills (coloured-pencil / gouache feel). Deep charcoal near-black background so it sits on a dark page, but the artwork itself is warm and colourful in a muted earthy palette (ochre, terracotta, teal, sage green, indigo, cream); no neon, no glow, no light beams, no orange haze, no 3D-render look. Calm and uncluttered. Ultra-wide banner, 16:5. Two simple scenes side by side: on the left a person leaning hard against a solid brick wall that does not move (effort in the pose, but no motion); on the right the same person easily pushing a loaded wooden cart that rolls forward. Lots of empty space. No text.

Hand-drawn coloured educational diagram — clean, elegant. Visible ink line work with soft hand-painted colour fills (coloured-pencil / gouache feel). Deep charcoal near-black background; warm muted colours with a soft teal accent for arrows only; no neon, no glow, no bright flashy colours, no 3D-render look. 4:3. Three small panels: (1) a force arrow and a displacement arrow in the same direction with a box moving — label 'Work done (W = F x s)'; (2) a force pushing a wall with no movement — label 'No displacement, no work'; (3) an upward force on a box that moves sideways — label 'Force at right angles to motion, no work'. All labels neat and fully legible hand-lettered. Calm and uncluttered.
